---
name: Philosopher request
about: Propose adding a new philosopher to the app
labels: philosopher-request
---

## Philosopher

**Name:**
**Tradition:** (e.g., Stoic, Epicurean, Buddhist, Confucian)
**Era:** (e.g., 469–399 BCE)

## Proposed primary sources

List the specific works you propose to include in the corpus, with their source URLs.

| Work | Source | URL | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| e.g., Phaedo | Project Gutenberg #1658 | https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/1658 | PD-US (Jowett translation) |

For each work, confirm:
- [ ] The text is public domain or CC0
- [ ] A plain-text version is available (Project Gutenberg `.txt` preferred)
- [ ] The translation is identified and its copyright status is clear

## Estimated corpus size

Roughly how many chunks (~300–600 words each) would the works produce? A rough estimate is fine.

## Why this philosopher?

What unique perspective or tradition would this philosopher bring that isn't currently covered?

## Are you willing to contribute the implementation?

- [ ] Yes, I can write the chunker, seed record, and system prompt
- [ ] No, I'm requesting this for someone else to implement
